title: olearia stenophylla
intro: Olearia stenophylla, also known as Snowy Tree Daisy, is a small shrub native to Australia, characterized by its delicate white flowers and silvery-green foliage. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Olearia stenophylla include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Olearia stenophylla can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been traditionally used by Indigenous Australians for its medicinal and spiritual properties.
